hero.sub: A {{word}} is a savings circle your community has run for generations. We made it unbreakable — secure, transparent, and fully on-chain.

tanda.title: What is a Tanda?
tanda.p1: A Tanda is a community savings circle. A group of people agree to each put in the same amount every week — and every week, one person takes home the whole pot. It rotates until everyone has received their payout.
tanda.p2: No interest. No middleman. No profit. Just a group of people helping each other save and get ahead — the way communities have done it for centuries.
tanda.p3: You might know it as an Osusu, Hui, Stokvel, Chit Fund, or Arisan — same idea, every culture has one.
tanda.p4: The problem? When the organizer disappears, or someone stops paying after getting their payout. DeFi Tanda fixes that with a smart contract — code nobody can override, not even us.

how.title: How it works
how.sub: Three steps. Works with your wallet or card.
how.step1: The organizer sets up a tanda — group size, weekly amount, and duration. Members join with a refundable security deposit that is returned to you when the tanda completes.
how.step2: Pay your share weekly, biweekly, or monthly. Use Apple Pay, Google Pay, debit card — or connect your crypto wallet directly.
how.step3: When your turn comes, the full pot lands in your wallet automatically. Early slot = interest-free loan. Late slot = disciplined savings plan.

why.title: Why DeFi Tanda?
why.sub: Everything that made traditional tandas break — fixed.

fraud.title: Nobody can run off with the money
fraud.body: A smart contract holds every dollar. The organizer manages the group — but never touches the funds. Payouts happen directly wallet to wallet.

bank.title: Pay your way
bank.body: Pay with a debit card, bank transfer, or connect a crypto wallet directly. Your money, your control.

remit.title: Send your payout anywhere
remit.body: Receive in XRP or RLUSD and send to family in seconds — for almost no fee. No Western Union. No 7% cut.

record.title: A permanent record
record.body: Every contribution and payout is recorded on the blockchain forever. No disputes, no 'I already paid.'

whatsapp.title: Share on WhatsApp
whatsapp.body: Invite members and share payment confirmations on WhatsApp or Telegram — organize where your community already is.

collateral.title: Your deposit comes back
collateral.body: Your security deposit is locked in the tanda while it runs. Once every cycle is complete, you claim it straight back to your wallet.

pay.title: Pay your way
pay.sub: You do not need crypto to get started. Use what you already have on your phone.
pay.fiatTitle: 💳 Buy with Debit or Bank Transfer
pay.fiatBody: Use a debit card or bank transfer to get XRP — no exchange account needed. Coming soon.
pay.walletBody: Already have XRP? Connect Xaman and pay directly from your wallet in seconds.
pay.alreadyPaidDesc: You already submitted your contribution for cycle {{cycle}}. No action needed.

chains.title: Built on XRP Ledger
chains.sub: Fast, cheap, and built for cross-border payments.

eth.body: The largest DeFi ecosystem. Best for bigger tandas and crypto-savvy groups.

xrpl.body: Settles in 3 seconds for a fraction of a cent. Perfect for weekly tanda payments and cross-border payouts.

learn.title: Never done crypto before?
learn.body1: That's okay — most of our users haven't either. Akademia is our free education center, built for people who grew up with tandas but are new to the digital side.
learn.body2: Short videos in Spanish and English. No jargon. From 'what is crypto' to 'how to send money to Mexico for free.'
learn.l1: ¿Qué es una tanda? — You already know this
learn.l3: ¿Qué es una wallet? — Your digital piggy bank
learn.l4: How to join your first tanda — step by step
learn.l5: Send your payout to Mexico for free

waitlist.title: Be the first to join
waitlist.body: We're launching with a small group of community members first. Leave your email and we'll reach out when your spot is ready.
waitlist.success: ✓ You're on the list! We'll be in touch.
waitlist.note: No spam. No sharing. Just a heads-up when we open.

dashboard.noWallet: Connect your wallet to get started
dashboard.noActiveDesc: Create your first tanda or browse open ones to join.

pod.claimBody: The tanda is complete! Claim your security deposit back.
pod.buyXrpHint: Buy XRP with Apple Pay, Google Pay, or a debit card — no exchange needed.
pod.creatorNote: You created this pod — join it to deposit your collateral
pod.xamanHint: Check Xaman — approve the collateral payment
pod.noMembersShare: No members yet. Share the link to invite people.

create.title: Create a Tanda
create.cancelPolicy: ⚠ What if the pod doesn't fill?
create.cancelPolicy1: You (the organizer) can cancel the pod at any time before it fills.
create.cancelPolicy2: All members who joined get their collateral back.
create.cancelPolicy3: The gas fee to deploy is non-refundable.
create.cancelPolicy4: No one loses their contribution — the pod never started.
create.metaMaskNote: 🔒 MetaMask will ask you to confirm two transactions.
create.xamanNote: 🔒 Xaman will confirm the escrow creation.
create.tokenSub: All members contribute and receive payouts in this token.

browse.title: Open Tandas
browse.sub: Join a community savings group that needs members.

walletPage.title: Wallet
walletPage.connectDesc: Connect MetaMask or Xaman to view your wallet.
walletPage.faucetDesc: Free test tokens — wallet funded in ~1 minute.
walletPage.faucetPaste: Paste your address and hit fund
walletPage.buyDesc: Apple Pay · Google Pay · Credit Card — no exchange needed

timeline.label: Our Journey
timeline.heading: From a napkin to the blockchain.
timeline.sub: Four years of building the future of community savings — one cycle at a time.
timeline.today_title: Testnet live. Fenbushi meeting. Ready to launch.
timeline.today_body: Full app running on XRPL devnet. Trilingual. Raising $1M seed.
timeline.y2022_body: Over tacos in Pilsen, one question kept coming up: why does grandma's tanda still run on paper and trust? The concept for DeFi Tanda is sketched on a napkin at a kitchen table.
timeline.y2023a_body: The name DeFi Tanda is chosen. The logo, the brand blue, the first Figma mocks. We wanted it to feel trustworthy, modern — something grandma and her grandkids would both use.
timeline.y2023b_body: First Solidity prototype deployed to Hardhat local. A real tanda lifecycle — create, join, pay, payout — running in code for the first time. Ugly but it worked.
timeline.y2023c_body: Discovered XRP Ledger: 3-second settlement, $0.001 fees, built for cross-border payments. It was purpose-built for tandas. We rebuilt everything on XRPL overnight.
timeline.y2024a_body: React frontend live. Xaman wallet integration working. First end-to-end tanda flow on XRPL devnet — a real person joined, paid, and received a payout from code, not a handshake.
timeline.y2024b_body: Designed the collateral enforcement system: 2× deposit locked on-chain, slashable if you default. Added RLUSD support — members can save and receive in a dollar-pegged stablecoin.
timeline.y2024c_body: Full Spanish localization shipped. Every screen, every error, every CTA — in the language our community actually speaks at home.
timeline.y2025a_body: Supabase database, Netlify serverless functions, daily cron job for overdue enforcement. A real system — not a demo. Admin panel for pod management and collateral release.
timeline.y2025b_body: Double-payment prevention, self-payment detection, missed-payment slash logic, multi-chain explorer links. Every edge case a tanda could hit — handled.
timeline.f2026a_body: XRPL mainnet with real funds. First 50 tanda groups onboarded in Chicago — Pilsen, Little Village, Chinatown. Fiat on-ramp via debit card. Ambassador program live.
timeline.f2026b_body: Idle collateral starts earning 4–8% APY via XRPL Vaults (XLS-66d). Capital protected. Your tanda saves together and earns together while it runs.
timeline.f2026c_body: iOS and Android app launch. Yield Tanda Phase 2: AMM liquidity strategy via XLS-30 for 5–15% APY. 1,000 active tanda groups. LA and Miami expansion.
timeline.f2027a_body: Full push into Chinese diaspora markets — Singapore, Malaysia, Taiwan. The Hui goes on-chain. Mandarin-first onboarding, local ambassador network, Fenbushi distribution.
timeline.f2027b_body: Solana and Ethereum deployments. On-chain reputation passport — your payment history becomes a portable credit score. B2B API for credit unions and community banks.
timeline.f2028_body: DeFi Tanda becomes infrastructure. 100,000 active members. $50M+ TVL. DAO governance. Any community, any chain, any currency — one protocol.
